title: mcp-companion project configuration
description: Per-project visibility overrides for MCP servers, read by mcp-companion.nvim from .mcp-companion.json walked up from the editor's current working directory at chat-session creation time. The file selects which servers (declared in your servers.json / mcpServers config) are exposed to a chat in this project, overriding the global cc.auto_http_tools / cc.auto_acp_tools settings.

allowed_servers.description: Names of MCP servers that should be visible to chat sessions in this project. All other configured servers are hidden. Mutually exclusive with disabled_servers.

disabled_servers.description: Names of MCP servers that should be hidden from chat sessions in this project. All other configured servers remain visible. Mutually exclusive with allowed_servers.

tool_system_prompts.description: Whether to add per-tool natural-language system messages alongside the tools array. Useful for models that ignore JSON-Schema descriptions; set to false to save tokens. Overrides the plugin-level cc.tool_system_prompts setting; defaults to true.

adapters.description: Per-adapter server filter overrides. Keys are adapter names (e.g. 'moonshot-ai', 'claude'). Each value overrides the top-level allowed_servers / disabled_servers for sessions using that specific adapter, allowing different models to see different subsets of MCP servers within the same project.

allowed_servers.description: Names of MCP servers visible to this adapter in this project. All other configured servers are hidden. Mutually exclusive with disabled_servers.

disabled_servers.description: Names of MCP servers hidden from this adapter in this project. All other configured servers remain visible. Mutually exclusive with allowed_servers.
